contextual.title: Study on the Difference of Axilo-rectal Temperature in Appendicitis
contextual.text:
Summary: The investigators are studying prospectively the difference in axilo-rectal temperature in patients with acute appendicitis and using as a control group patients consulting with acute gastroenteritis at our emergency unit.
Inclusion criteria: inclusion criteria: 

 Patients with acute appendicitis 

 Patients with acute gastroenteritis 

 Patients older than 15 years of age 

 
Exclusion criteria: : 

 Other acute abdominal diseases
